allowlist.reason: Lower-bound-exclusive pair to QA-09's min-width:640 at Footer.astro mobile-collapse layout (PDR-006 § Mobile § Footer). QA-09 already baselines 320-600 (mobile-stacked) and 640+ (desktop-row); the 639 boundary is a CSS implementation detail with no independent layout state.

Spacer activation lower-band for footer social-icon widow fix (#151 / QA-10.3 Invariant 10). Below 375 natural wrap is 2+3+3+1 widowing RSS; spacer activates to redistribute to 2+3+2+2. QA-09 baselines 320 (spacer active) and 375 (spacer inactive) cover both states; 374 is the CSS implementation boundary between them, no independent layout state to audit.

Spacer activation upper-band for footer social-icon widow fix (#151 / QA-10.3 Invariant 10). Compound rule (min-width:767) and (max-width:845) handles mid-tablet widow where exact widow-start drifts ~1px between macOS/Linux Chromium (767 vs 768) — 767 lower bound covers both OSes deterministically. Above 845 all 9 icons fit single-row naturally (~848-900 on Linux). QA-09 baselines 767 and 768 (both spacer-active) cover the activated state; 1024 (spacer-inactive) covers above-band; 845 is a CSS compound-query upper bound with no independent layout state.
